content: Self-Refine's iterative, unsupervised self-feedback loop for output polishing can be grounded by integrating multiple inconsistent perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanisms to resolve blind spots that single-perspective self-feedback cannot catch. This creates a hybrid framework that retains Self-Refine's core advantage of no additional training or supervision while improving refinement accuracy by surfacing hidden flaws a single self-feedback pass misses.
